delete_confirm_msg: Delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
ai_plan_required: Upgrade your plan to use this AI feature.
ai_rate_limited: AI usage limit reached for this month.
ai_error: AI service error. Please try again.
select_session: Select a session from the calendar above
mode_toggle_tooltip: Switch between Simple and Pro mode at any time
onboarding_welcome_desc: Your coach has prepared your program. Explore the tabs below to get started.
onboarding_program_desc: Each week is organized into sessions. Tap a session to start it.
onboarding_session_desc: Validate each set by tapping ✓. Enter your weight to track your progress.
onboarding_timer_desc: The timer starts automatically between sets. You can adjust it in settings.
onboarding_builder_desc: Choose duration, target muscles, and available equipment. We'll generate your session.
onboarding_nutrition_desc: Add your meals in seconds. Your coach can see your intake.
onboarding_checkin_desc: Each week, report your energy and sleep levels. Helps your coach adjust your program.
onboarding_coach_invite_desc: Copy your invite code and send it to your athletes to connect them to you.
